title: Gaming User Acquisition Spend Hits $25 Billion as AI Fuels Creative Boom
summary: Global gaming advertisers spent $25 billion on user acquisition in 2025, with AI-driven production enabling 25-30% YoY content increases for top spenders and up to 40% for smaller advertisers. AI reduces production costs and time, allowing marketers to test ads at scale.

title: 50% of Mobile Game Creatives Will Be AI-Generated by End of 2026
summary: Industry prediction that by end of 2026, half of mobile game creatives will be AI-generated with quality indistinguishable from human-made assets. AI tools reduce production time and costs while enabling faster iterations and customization.

title: Playable Ads Emerge as Dominant Creative Format in Gaming UA
summary: Playable ads predicted to become dominant creative format in 2026, with reusable templates from high-performing genres like 3×3 puzzle mechanics. Templates drastically reduce production time and costs while increasing engagement and conversion rates.

title: AI Advertising Creative Tools: Generation vs Intelligence Platforms
summary: AI advertising tools split into generation tools (produce raw assets) and intelligence tools (analyze performance). Segwise leads intelligence layer with multimodal AI tagging for video, audio, image, text, and playable ads. AdCreative.ai offers conversion-trained generation starting at $39/mo.

title: 86% of Advertisers Use or Plan to Use Generative AI for Video Ads
summary: IAB reports 86% of advertisers already use or plan to use generative AI in video ad creation, with nearly 40% of video ads involving generative AI by 2026. Global digital ad spend projected to exceed $740 billion in 2026, with mobile video surpassing search spending.

title: AI-Generated UGC Actors Scale Video Production Without Real Creators
summary: Arcads generates AI UGC-style video ads with significantly improved quality in 2026, serving as complement to real creator content. Tools like Creatify generate 5-10 video ads with lifelike AI avatars from product links, enabling performance marketers to scale production.

title: AI-Generated Static Ads Production-Ready for Gaming Campaigns
summary: AI-generated product images and ad layouts from tools like AdCreative.ai are production-ready for static ads. For video, AI-generated B-roll and UGC-style content increasingly used directly in campaigns, though high-stakes hero content still benefits from human production.

title: Real-Time Personalization and Dynamic Monetization Through AI
summary: AI is shifting gaming monetization from manual testing to real-time personalization. Difficulty curves, ad timing, and reward structures are being tailored for each player dynamically, with AI-generated UGCs, playables, and videos scaling creative production massively.

title: AI Creative Agent Analyzes Top-Performing Ads and Generates Briefs
summary: Standout 2026 capability: AI Creative Agent analyzes top-performing ads, generates creative briefs from winning patterns, and identifies reusable hooks from asset libraries. Operates on brand context rather than generic internet data for immediately actionable outputs.

title: Content Production Surge: 25-40% YoY Growth Driven by AI
summary: Top gaming spenders increased content production 25-30% YoY in 2025, while smaller advertisers increased output up to 40% YoY to stay competitive. AI-powered production lowers costs and time needed to generate and test ads at scale, though market saturation is increasing.
